text: The improvements are well maintained and feature limited physical depreciation due to normal wear and tear. Some components, but not every major building component, may be updated or recently rehabilitated. The structure has been well maintained. During the time of inspection the basement and foundation were observed and no immediate necessary repairs were identified. The condition of the subject's foundation is consistent with that of houses of a similar age and location, however, the appraiser lacks the qualifications to be considered an expert in foundation repair. The subject is a two-unit multi-family residence that features two above grade bedrooms, two above grade bathrooms, partial unfinished basement, enclosed porch, and detached two-car garage.
